name: BMG Resources Limited
summary: BMG Resources Limited, a mineral exploration company, engages in the exploration and development of mineral resource projects in the Republic of Cyprus. The company primarily explores for copper, nickel, zinc, cobalt, gold, silver, and lithium deposits. It holds 30% interest in the Treasure project with 10 exploration licenses covering a total of 36.7 square kilometers located in the Republic of Cyprus. The company also holds interests in the Abercromby Project located in the Wiluna district; the Invincible Project located in district of Central Pilbara; and the South Boddington Project located in 150km south-east of Perth. BMG Resources Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Perth, Australia.
